scripts.dev:rust: cd rust-engine && cargo run --bin gateway & cd rust-engine && cargo run --bin tile-server & cd rust-engine && cargo run --bin webrtc-router & wait
scripts.start:rust: cd rust-engine && cargo run --release --bin gateway & cd rust-engine && cargo run --release --bin tile-server & cd rust-engine && cargo run --release --bin webrtc-router & wait
